ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* Billing city of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* Billing state of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Billing country of the customer */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Billing postal code of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the invoice belongs to */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was created */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "billing_city" TEXT /* Billing city of the customer */,
  "billing_state" TEXT /* Billing state of the customer */,
  "billing_country" TEXT /* Billing country of the customer */,
  "billing_postal_code" TEXT /* Billing postal code of the customer */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal amount of the invoice */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount of the invoice */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount amount of the invoice */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the invoice was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the invoice was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line item */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the line item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the line item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the line item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the line item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the payment method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the payment method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID of the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment status (e.g., pending, paid, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the payment status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the payment status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the invoice status (e.g., draft, sent, paid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the invoice status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the invoice status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the invoice status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate (e.g., 0.08 for 8%) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax rate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the tax rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the tax rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_tax_rates" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice */,
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax rate applied to the invoice */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the tax rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the tax rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id", "tax_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the order status (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the order status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the order status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES order_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the line item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the line item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the line item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the line item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
